title: cystopteris fragilis f. protrusa
intro: Cystopteris fragilis f. protrusa, also known as a fern variety, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cystopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Cystopteris fragilis f. protrusa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
